use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF CYSTIC FIBROSIS IN PATIENTS AGED 12 YEARS AND OLDER WHO HAVE AT LEAST ONE F508DEL MUTATION IN THE CFTR GENE WITH ELEXACAFTOR, TEZACAFTOR, AND IVACAFTOR
